title: El portero
writer: Miguel M. Delgado, Carlos León, Jaime Salvador
actors: Cantinflas, Silvia Pinal, Carlos Martínez Baena
plot: Cantinflas works as a porter, who writes letters and speeches in his old writing machine to earn an extra money, despite the fact that he still goes to school. The sentimental issues come when Cantinflas falls in love with his pre...
